title: It's Not Copper Tools
description: A standalone content mod for Beta 1.7.3 that aims to expand on the game while keeping the sandbox feel.
body:
It's Not Copper Tools is a mod for beta 1.7.3 that I'm working on because I do not like copper tools (surprise, surprise.) It's really just a personal project, so I can't guarantee any update schedule or any updates at all, but feel free to report any bugs, I'll most likely fix them with the next update, or in a patch.

As of 1.0.0a, adds copper, new wood variant blocks, improved functionality to existing blocks such as slabs, a plethora of new stone variant blocks, the anvil, and the stonecutter alongside rose gold tools.

**Disclaimer! Any worlds loaded with the conversion mode config options on will most likely be broken if loaded afterwards without the mod! This mod replaces many vanilla blocks and items!**

**This mod has not been tested for multiplayer and may not function properly.**
